hero.description: A wide range of dog clothes that combine function and design. Enjoy walks and events with your furry friend.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Wanko Style
whyUs.reason1Desc: Patterns designed to fit dog body shapes. We pursue both ease of movement and ease of dressing.
whyUs.reason2Desc: Made with skin-friendly cotton and organic materials. Durable stitching that holds up after washing.
whyUs.reason3Desc: Free shipping on orders over ¥5,000. 14-day return and exchange guarantee for your peace of mind.
